---
name: Bug report
description: Report a problem with this software or project
labels: kind/bug-report
---

<!--
Note: please search through existing issues and pull requests on
GitHub in case the topic has already been discussed.
-->

### Describe the problem
<!--
Please explain clearly and in detail what the issue is. What were you
trying to do? What happened? What was unexpected about what happened?
-->

### Explain how to reproduce the issue
<!--
Explain in a step-by-step fashion what someone else will need to
do in order to reproduce the issue. If possible, include literal
examples of commands or code using Markdown fenced code blocks.
For long output, paste the text into collapsed HTML sections.
-->

### What version of OpenFermion are you using?
<!--
What version does this happen in? Write the version number below.
-->

### What computing environment are you using?
<!--
Please tell us what kind of computing system you are using (e.g.,
Linux, Mac, Windows, Google Colab, Google Cloud, etc.) as well as the
the version, and if relevant, any special hardware features it has,
such as a GPU.
-->
